name: generate-assets
description: Generate high-quality images and assets for components (hero sections, features, transformations) using Replicate's FLUX 1.1 Pro model.
capabilities: Generate images using FLUX 1.1 Pro AI model from text prompts
Create hero sections, feature showcases, and transformation graphics
Remove backgrounds for transparent foreground assets
Auto-detect existing image dimensions to maintain consistency
Enhance prompts with modern UI elements and design patterns
Save optimized WebP images to public/assets/images/
author: AayushBaniya2006
securitySummary: This is a legitimate image generation skill that makes targeted API calls to Replicate for FLUX 1.1 Pro image generation. The static analyzer flagged patterns (network + credentials + filesystem) that appear suspicious but are standard for API-based tools. Accesses REPLICATE_API_TOKEN for authentication only. Writes files only to public/assets/images directory. No data exfiltration or malicious behavior detected.
valueStatement: Creating visual assets for websites takes time and design skills. This skill uses FLUX 1.1 Pro AI to generate hero sections, feature images, and UI graphics with automatic enhancement. Images are optimized as WebP and saved directly to your project.
userTitle: Generate AI images for web components
limitations: Requires REPLICATE_API_TOKEN environment variable to be set
Generates one      "Output is limited to WebP format only
Background removal uses separate bria/remove-background model

useCases.title: Hero section visuals
useCases.description: Generate wide-format hero images for landing pages from simple text descriptions

useCases.title: Feature showcase graphics
useCases.description: Create square feature images with automatic UI styling for product pages

useCases.title: Transparent foreground assets

promptTemplates.title: Basic hero image
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a hero section image for a modern SaaS dashboard showing analytics charts

promptTemplates.title: Feature card
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a feature image showing AI-powered content generation with a clean interface

promptTemplates.title: Transparent asset
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate decorative floating shapes with transparent background for UI overlay

promptTemplates.title: Transformation graphic
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a transformation graphic showing content optimization before and after

bestPractices: Use specific subject descriptions in prompts for better AI interpretation
Let the script auto-enhance prompts - it adds professional styling automatically
Match existing image dimensions when replacing assets to maintain layout consistency
antiPatterns: Using overly generic prompts like 'make it look good' without specific subject
Requesting multiple asset types in a single prompt - generate each separately
Forgetting to set REPLICATE_API_TOKEN before running the skill

faq.question: Which AI models does this skill use?
faq.answer: Primary model is FLUX 1.1 Pro from Replicate for image generation. Optional bria/remove-background model is used for transparent assets.

faq.question: What image formats are supported?
faq.answer: Output is always WebP format optimized for web performance. Aspect ratios supported include 1:1, 16:9, 4:3, 9:16, and 21:9.

faq.question: How do I integrate with my project?
faq.answer: Install dependencies with 'pnpm add replicate' and 'pnpm add sharp -D'. Set REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in your .env file before use.

faq.question: Is my data sent to external servers?
faq.answer: Images are generated via Replicate's API and temporarily stored on their servers. Final assets are saved only to your project's public directory.

faq.question: Why is my generation failing?
faq.answer: Common causes: missing REPLICATE_API_TOKEN, insufficient Replicate credits, network issues, or prompts violating content guidelines.

faq.question: How is this different from other image generators?
faq.answer: This skill is optimized for web components with automatic prompt enhancement, dimension matching, and direct file output to your project.
